---
title: Volume 18/1
description: Articles published in the March 2026 issue
draft: no
date: '2026-03-01'
volume: 18
issue: 1
editors:
  chief:
  - name: Emi Tanaka
    affiliation: Australian National University
    country: Australia
  executive:
  - name: Rob J Hyndman
    affiliation: Monash University
    country: Australia
  - name: Emily Zabor
    affiliation: Cleveland Clinic
    country: United States
  - name: Vincent Arel-Bundock
    affiliation: University of Montreal
    country: Canada
  technical:
  - name: Abhishek Ulayil
    affiliation: ' '
    country: India
articles:
  before: ~
  after: ~
output:
  rjtools::rjournal_pdf_issue:
    render_all: yes
  rjtools::rjournal_web_issue: default
news: RJ-2026-1-rfoundation

---






&nbsp;
